# TRACE_CLAUDE.md — External Reference Stub

> **Provenance**: This is a reference stub for the host-application
> traceability document `TRACE_CLAUDE.md`. The original document is
> maintained in the host project repository, not in this SDK.

## Status

This artifact was requested during milestone release-readiness audits
as part of the authoritative document corpus. It is a host-application
document that traces Claude integration points and is not an AIGC SDK
artifact.

## Canonical AIGC Equivalents

The following AIGC-native documents cover the SDK-side concerns that
`TRACE_CLAUDE.md` addresses at the host-application level:

- [AIGC_HIGH_LEVEL_DESIGN.md](../../architecture/AIGC_HIGH_LEVEL_DESIGN.md) —
  enforcement pipeline architecture and gate ordering
- [INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md](../../INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md) —
  host system integration patterns, compliance checklist, and
  governance boundary documentation
